programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team tries to convince a wealthy scientist, who stole from his former research partner, that he has made first contact with aliens.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team attempts to bring down a restaurateur who destroys lives in his pursuit of fame and money.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team must tackle Congress in order to bring down a competitive cheerleading company that profits by putting teenage girls at risk.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When a dying FBI agent reveals his greatest failure, Nate becomes obsessed with solving the mystery.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team fakes the discovery of an antique car in order to convince a Wall Street fraud to break the deal that protects him from prosecution.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Parker is left behind on the crew's latest job because of her broken leg; Parker discovers a group of thieves are planning a heist.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Col. Vance, Eliot, Hardison and Parker race to stop a terrorist from launching an attack on Washington.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: Fast-talking diamond dealer Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) and his wife, Sarah (Nicole Kidman), live the good life in a beautiful home surrounded by thick woods. Their dream life turns into a nightmare when violent thieves, led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn), invade their home disguised as police officers. With Kyle and Sarah now frightened captives, Kyle knows he must use every negotiating trick in his book, for once Elias and his men get what they want, the Millers will likely be killed.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: After several years away, FBI agent Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) returns to find his mother, Marty (Meg Ryan), a much different person: Having long mourned for Henry's father, she is now embracing single life. One day, while Marty, Henry and his new fiancée, Emily (Selma Blair), are out for a walk, they meet Tommy (Antonio Banderas), a mysterious stranger, with whom Marty then becomes involved. However, through his FBI contacts, Henry learns that Tommy is suspected of being an art thief.

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: Day Of The Dead
programme.desc: A zombie classic from George Romero.

programme.title: Eraserhead
programme.desc: Surreal nightmare about a man, his mutant child, and industrial decay.

programme.title: Hush
programme.desc: A deaf and mute writer who retreated into the woods to live a solitary life must fight for her life in silence

programme.title: Silent Hill Revelation
programme.desc: When her adoptive father disappears, Sharon Da Silva is drawn into a strange and terrifying alternate reality that holds answers to the horrific nightmares that have plagued her since childhood.

programme.title: Donnie Darko
programme.desc: After escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a man in a large rabbit suit

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: A small-time gambler gets more than he bargained for when his car breaks down near a remote desert town.

programme.title: Lake Placid 2
programme.desc: Three giant crocodiles terrorize locals and tourists at a lakeside resort.

programme.title: The Take
programme.desc: After he's shot during a heist in East L.A., an armored-truck driver (Leguizamo) wrestles with rehabilitation and tracking down the man (Gibson) who committed the crime.

programme.title: The Principal
programme.desc: At the toughest high school in town, the biggest troublemaker is the principal. Edited for TV

programme.title: Gridiron Gang
programme.desc: Juvenile detention camp probation officers Sean Porter, and Malcolm Moore, turn a group of hard core teenage felons into a high school football team.

programme.title: Divorce American Style
programme.desc: About a nouveau-riche Los Angeles couple who, after 17 years of marriage, decide to call it quits.

programme.title: Only Angels Have Wings
programme.desc: ONLY ANGELS HAVE WINGS is a powerful character study and an amazing adventure film in which Grant, the head of a broken-down air freight company, sends courageous pilots over the treacherous Andes Mountains in Peru. Rita Hayworth gives a notable performance as a vamp.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes To Washington
programme.desc: James Stewart takes on the powers-that-be in our nations capitol in Frank Capras timeless classic. Nominated for eleven 1939 Oscars, including best picture.

programme.title: Glengarry Glen Ross
programme.desc: Adapted from his Pulitzer Prize-winning play, Glengarry Glen Ross shows David Mamet at his searing, profane best. A group of Chicago real-estate salesmen-cum-con artists live on the edge. Life is good for the one on a roll. For the rest, life hangs in the balance. There is no room for losers. A-B-C: Always Be Closing, sell or go under, is the salesman's mantra. With the pressure on, so begins a rainy night of cutthroat business and shattered lives.

programme.title: The Compleat Al
programme.desc: The Compleat Al is the amazing, hilarious and not entirely true story of “Weird Al” Yankovic, the Grammy award-winning master of musical parody and rock and roll comedy. The mockumentary takes you behind the scenes, beginning with his childhood years, his high school and college days, and up through his early-career rise to stardom.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chen Wing Yan, a policeman, successfully infiltrates a gang while Lau Kin Ming, a tried member, becomes a mole in the police force. However, things change when both of them must seek each other out.

programme.title: Nightbreed: Director's Cut
programme.desc: Boone (Craig Sheffer) may be a troubled young man, but his troubles are just beginning. Set up as the fall guy in a string of slasher murders, he decides he'll hide by crossing the threshold that separates “us” from “them” and sneak into the forbidden subterranean realm of Midian. Boone will live among the monsters.

programme.title: Nerve
programme.desc: Partnered with a sly competitor, a high schooler plays an online game of dare that takes a sinister turn.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: In a seemingly perfect community, a boy is chosen to learn about the pain and pleasure of the "real" world.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: After an alien invasion, an unlikely recruit commands Earth's forces and fights for the future of humanity.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: An ex-con and his adopted brother go on the run with a weapon of mysterious origin as their only protection.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: The Brink
programme.desc: A reckless police inspector is on a mission to crack down on a criminal's gold smuggling scheme.

programme.title: The Grandmaster of Kungfu
programme.desc: In the late Qing Dynasty, Grandmaster Huo Yuan Jia leads Tianjin martial artists in defense of the country against Japanese invaders.

programme.title: The Rise of Hero
programme.desc: Huang Feihong wants to make a living in Guangzhou. With the help of Zhou Shisan and Lu Yibai, he is finally allowed to take an exam in Guangzhou, and he may be able to study abroad. But after he gets there, he discovers a conspiracy among city leaders and the conservatives in the court led by Eunuch Hai, who wants to end the Studying Abroad Campaign launched by the Westernization Movement.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: After a shocking betrayal by his sworn brother, a general (Andy Lau) takes refuge at a Shaolin temple and learns martial arts from a crazy cook (Jackie Chan).

programme.title: Alienoid
programme.desc: Gurus in the late Goryeo dynasty try to obtain a fabled, holy sword, and humans in 2022 hunt down an alien prisoner that is locked in a human's body. The two parties cross paths when a time-traveling portal opens up.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: In this thriller, a woman tries to help her sister recall the events of the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: Lindsay and Will bond after agreeing the dating service that matched them has made a mistake.

programme.title: A Mother's Sacrifice
programme.desc: A mother fear that her daughter has been abducted when a phone call is interrupted by something suspicious.

programme.title: Ties that Bind
programme.desc: Detective takes in her jailed brothers unruley teenagers whilst looking after her own and solving crime.

programme.title: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Mike tries to get out of the drug trade to save his little sister, Angel, and leaves her with John (Cuba Gooding Jr.), an undercover cop. Mike is killed, and the drug lords kidnap Angel, forcing John to use all of his skills to save the innocent girl.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Gun
programme.desc: Rich is the police's prime target against the war on gun runners. When an exchange goes bad, paranoia ensues, causing rifts among Rich and his team.

programme.title: Nico
programme.desc: After a teenage boy is brutally murdered, Detective Carrera defies orders to pursue the truth. As corruption within the police force is exposed, the investigation spirals into a deadly confrontation that will reshape the city and Nico's legacy.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Game of Cards
programme.desc: When data analyst Nicole Tucker’s car is broken into and a mysterious military-issued card tied to her family legacy is stolen, she’s thrust into a dangerous game of betrayal. Her search for the truth uncovers a chilling connection between the theft and her boyfriend Michael, forcing Nicole to confront dark secrets, deadly allies, and a past that refuses to stay buried.

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A self-absorbed and ill-equipped father struggles to reconnect with his estranged and embittered son following his discovery of his affair with another woman. Wanting to defend his mother’s honor, his son decides to seek revenge on the mistress.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: After the murder of his fiancée and her lover, Cameron escapes Atlanta under a new identity and loses the trail of the investigators. When he meets Lauren after settling in Florida, his cover begins to crack when a neighbor begins asking questions, and opening secrets that are supposed to be buried.

programme.title: Commandments of a Female Hustler
programme.desc: Three childhood friends, Lala, Binky, and Jay grew up together on the streets of East Baltimore. Wanting a better life for themselves, they learn the ways of hustling. When they align themselves with one of the most powerful drug dealers in the game, their loyalties are tested, and the very commandments that once bound them start to break.

programme.title: Ease the Pain
programme.desc: This story is about a young black female named Tracey, who suffers from a mixture of things like not being loved and feeling lonely. She can't love herself enough to love someone. She sleeps with different men to make herself feel wanted but that doesn't work because she ends up killing them after the sex. She despises her ex-boyfriend because he doesn't want to be with her because he thinks she's psychotic! The one thing that she protects are her 2 children until... one day! One day it all comes tumbling down on her and she snaps!

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Plummeting temperatures signify the dawn of a new Ice Age.

programme.title: Triassic World
programme.desc: Dinosaurs used to grow human organs for transplants escape. The scientists that created them must fight back.

programme.title: American Warships
programme.desc: When a fleet of mysterious ships wage war against Earth, the crew of the USS Iowa must prevent armageddon.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and George hack Altura's defenses and discover Estes' secret plan.

programme.title: Titanic II
programme.desc: History threatens to repeat itself during a voyage to commemorate the liner's 100th anniversary.

programme.title: Apocalypse of Ice
programme.desc: In a pandemic, a polar vortex will cover Earth in ice. The cure must get to the equator in 24 hours.

programme.title: Nomads (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A French anthropologist intends to settle peacefully in Los Angeles, but a mystical band of deadly evil spirits(lead by Adam Ant)-- the incarnation of nomads he once studied -- materialize to haunt him.

programme.title: Camp Cold Brook (Edited Version)
programme.desc: TV producer Jack Wilson (Chad Michael Murray) fears his paranormal reality show will be cancelled. Desperate to increase the ratings, Wilson takes his filming crew out to investigate the legendary Camp Cold Brook--an abandoned summer camp where a mass murder had taken place decades ago. They soon realize they are not alone

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre (Edited Version)
programme.desc: When Trish (Michele Michaels) decides to invite her high school girls basketball teammates over for a slumber party, she has no idea the night is going to end with an unexpected guest an escaped mental patient and his portable power drill crashing the party in the cult classic, The Slumber Party Massacre.

programme.title: Nomads (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A French anthropologist intends to settle peacefully in Los Angeles, but a mystical band of deadly evil spirits(lead by Adam Ant)-- the incarnation of nomads he once studied -- materialize to haunt him.

programme.title: Camp Cold Brook (Edited Version)
programme.desc: TV producer Jack Wilson (Chad Michael Murray) fears his paranormal reality show will be cancelled. Desperate to increase the ratings, Wilson takes his filming crew out to investigate the legendary Camp Cold Brook--an abandoned summer camp where a mass murder had taken place decades ago. They soon realize they are not alone

programme.title: The Nightshifter
programme.desc: Stênio works the graveyard shift in the morgue of a vast, violent city. Each night he prepares the lifeless corpses for examination, but he's never alone. For Stênio can talk to the dead...

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: The forces of nature tremble with an unseen evil in this chilling western tale of madness, paranoia and supernatural terror howling across the homestead.

programme.title: The Noonday Witch
programme.desc: After movingto a rural village, Eliska must protect her daughter from the mysterious woman who haunts the surrounding farm fields.

programme.title: The Reckoning
programme.desc: Thrown in jail after being falsely accused of being a witch, Grace must endure extreme physical persecution at the hands of a ruthless witch hunter.

programme.title: The Dark and the Wicked
programme.desc: On a secluded farm, a man is bedridden and fighting through his final breaths while his wife slowly succumbs to overwhelming grief. Siblings Louise and Michael return home to help, but it doesn't take long for them to see that something's wrong with mom-something more than her heavy sorrow. Gradually, they begin to suffer a darkness similar to their mother's, marked by waking nightmares and a growing sense that an evil entity is taking over their family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: Gene Autry stops singing long enough to take on some nasty land developers in this oldtime western from Republic Pictures. Of course, it wouldnt be a Gene Autry movie if there werent at least a few songs, and this one comes packed with such numbers as Im Beginning to Care, Love, Burning Love, and the title song. Genes longtime sidekick Smiley Burnette gets to sing a few, too, including She Works Third Tub at the Laundry.

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Smiley Burnette are back, and this time theyre dealing with some very modern thinking rustlers. These new criminals have taken up the latest technologies to outsmart the authorities, including shortwave radios and airplanes! Can Gene and Smiley get em? You bet! Songs include The West Aint What It Used To Be, I Got the HeebieJeebie Blues, and The Defective Detective from Brooklyn. Gene also gets romantic when he sings, I Picked up the Trail when I Found You...

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos
programme.desc: Roy Rogers finds himself elected sheriff in a wild Texas town after the Civil War. But can Roy handle a place under martial law? And can he save Gabby Hayes from being executed? And how many songs will he get to sing? Clear the burrs from your saddle and get ready for a good one, also starring Marjorie Reynolds, plus Sally Payne as Belle Starr, Queen of the Oklahoma Outlaws!

programme.title: Tumbleweeds
programme.desc: The great William S. Hart stars in this classic tale of settlers in the Oklahoma territory. Directed by King Baggot, one of the most versatile movie figures of the silent era, this movie is not only history recorded in heart throbs, as the original print ads boasted, but shows us why Hart is considered by some to be the top western actor of them all. Hart, who directed many of his own films, also had a hand in directing this feature, which turned out to be his last starring role.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Baseball superstar Gehrig is one of several ranchers being coerced by a bunch of bandits. His sister and her lawyer/lover organize the ranchers. Directed by Ray Taylor; starring Smith Ballew, Gehrig, Evelyn Knapp. Talk about stunt casting! Gehrig was a New York Yankees star who was nearing the end of his career, but one of the biggest sports stars in the country. In the movie he plays a variation of himself, as Lou Gehrig, a retired baseball player who takes up ranching. Lou expects to relax on his ranch but quickly joins other ranchers in a fight to protect their properties.

programme.title: Desperadoes of the West

Dude Dawson is behind the gang as he is out to prevent the co-op members from striking oil before their lease expires, so he can secure the property for his company. When Ward, with the help of Arnold and his daughter Sally, arranges for a new driller to be brought in, the replacement man is killed and one of Dawson's men takes his place.

programme.title: We Converted Our £2,000 Estate Cars into Campers!
programme.desc: After buying cheap estate cars, Mike and Maxwell have been tasked by Richard Hammond to convert them into cheap campers, the ultimate petrolhead 'sleepers'. With each car graded on set-up time, entertainment and sleep score, will the mighty BMW 330 or the plucky SAAB 9-5 take the victory?

programme.title: This Renault Espace has an 800bhp F1 V10 engine!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie travels to the Matra museum in France to dig out one of the most extreme builds ever undertaken by a manufacturer, the Espace F1. Made especially famous via Gran Turismo, this Renault was built by the Williams F1 team in the ‚Äò90s as a showcase for the Renault 3.5-litre V10 engine, which was inserted bang in the middle of the car. With zero suspension to speak of, this people carrier was apparently very sketchy to drive around corners, but was savagely quick in a straight line. We dive into the nerdiest parts of its engineering and suss out how on Earth the ‚Äò90s engineers managed to make this vehicle work.

programme.title: Just How Bad is Richard Hammond's Grand Tour Ford Capri?
programme.desc: In true DriveTribe tradition, we’ve made sure to drag another Richard Hammond car out of the secret Grand Tour compound. This one is super special however, as it is Richard’s final ever Grand Tour special car, a Ford Capri from the ‘One For The Road’ special. Fresh off the boat from Zimbabwe, Mike dives into every nook and cranny of the Capri, studying its battle scars and associating the car’s anatomy and bruises with scenes from the show.

programme.title: After 9 years, Richard Hammond Has Finally Done It
programme.desc: After a couple of years of development, Richard Hammond took his last ever Top Gear car racing! He entered the modified MGB into a classic car race at Oulton Park, and with Ben Collins (the old Stig) there to support him, Richard's aim was simply to finish the race. With the car being in good shape, all he had to do was not crash...

programme.title: When Peugeot Turned Up The Boost TOO FAR (It EXPLODED)
programme.desc: Mike explains the story behind the crazy one-hit-wonder Peugeot WM P88. They knew they weren���t going to win the Le Mans 24 Hours, so they at least wanted to achieve something with their twin-turbo V6 car. So they waited for the evening to cool the air, taped up all the cracks on the car, and cranked the turbos up to achieve over 900bhp and send it down the Mulsanne straight at a new record speed ��� 252mph ��� the first car to achieve over 400kph at Le Mans. The speeds the Peugeot reached forced the ACO to change the Mulsanne straight, whacking in two massive chicanes that exist to this day, massively slowing down the once legendary long straight.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Commutes To Work In His 650bhp Porsche 911 Turbo S
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has had a lot on his plate in 2024, so he decided to whack a camera in his Porsche 911 Turbo S to give us a life update while commuting to The Smallest Cog.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Takes His Daughter Off-Roading In His NEW Twin Turbo Daily!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has a new daily ‚Äì it has two turbos, all-wheel drive and a truck bed... Taking the place of the DriveTribe Ram TRX, Izzy Hammond is brought in to sign off this new addition to the garage, hopefully be given the thumbs up as Richard's new daily driver.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Has Bought His ULTIMATE Estate Car!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has bought a new car! It's an estate, it'll fit into his car collection perfectly, and he's very proud of it...

programme.title: We Found the Lost 40kg, 400bhp Nissan Engine! (It's INCREDIBLE)
programme.desc: Mike Fernie goes full journalist and tracks down Nissan���s insane 40kg, 400bhp engine. Situated at racecar builders RML, Mike gets up close and personal to the tiny engine block, interviewing the RML engineers about how they developed the 3-cylinder turbo engine.

programme.title: This is how Porsche's new SIX-STROKE engine works!
programme.desc: Every car engine, bar a few two-stroke outliers, have used the four-stroke engine cycle which was created back in the 1800s. Porsche is looking to shake things up and has recently filed a patent for a unique six-stroke engine, somehow adding strokes into what has been the staple for over 150 years. Mike attempts to explain the fundamental physics behind this new engine cycle, and why Porsche might be using it in their sportscars of the future.

programme.title: When Audi Put a 6.0 litre, 500bhp, V12 Diesel in a Q7
programme.desc: Mike Fernie dives into the crazy diesel technology pioneered by Audi Sport in the mid-2000s. Using twin turbo V12 diesel power on track, they then turned to putting the same configuration in a road car, creating the 6.0-litre V12 diesel Audi Q7 V12 TDI.

programme.title: How Nissan Made 1000 BHP Look Easy
programme.desc: The RB26 engine has been done to death, but the R35���s V6 hasn���t really been deep-dived despite its performance credentials. Mike Fernie pours over the anatomy of an R35 GT-R���s V6, picking through the engineering of each main component and laying out why it���s an engine that can be tuned incredibly easily.

programme.title: Giving Our £1 Engine the Restoration It Deserved!
programme.desc: Earlier this year, we saved a legendary straight-six engine from a scrapyard. We paid one pound for it. And it was in BAD shape. We literally forklifted it out of a hedge, transported it to Jaguar specialist Tom Lenthall’s, and stripped it down to see just how bad things were after years sitting outside in the elements. By the end of today’s video, the engine will be rebuilt, and totally transformed

programme.title: I Drove the Most Terrifying Car on Sale (1000 HP V12!)
programme.desc: After blowing up car internet last year through our geeky TVR Cerbera Speed 12 video, Mike has been invited to actually drive one of these beasts. Sporting a 6.0-litre twin turbo V12 that generates up to 1000bhp, this will easily be the scariest car Mike has ever driven.

programme.title: Why BMW Hates V6 Engines
programme.desc: BMW has never made one of the most obvious engine layouts, the versatile V6. Mike dives into the engineering of a V6 versus a straight-six, and why BMW has always opted for the latter.

programme.title: Richard Hammond ROASTS James May's Pub
programme.desc: For the first time since he bought the Royal Oak, James May has invited Richard Hammond for a tour of his pub.

programme.title: Ben Collins Attempts the Impossible Climb
programme.desc: Ben Collins’ farm has an impossible hill that apparently no normal vehicle can ascend. The ex-Stig lines up three off-roading vehicles to try and defeat this muddy challenge, and one of them doesn't even have any wheels...

programme.title: Ben Collins Finally Sets a Lap Record!
programme.desc: Mike and Ben head to the northernmost race circuit in the UK ��� Knockhill ��� to set the EV lap record. Using MG's latest performance cars through the Cyberster and 4 X-Power, the lads head out on track to make history!

programme.title: We Took These Legendary 2000s Cars On A 400-mile Road Trip!
programme.desc: Ben and Mike are heading on a road trip to celebrate the 2000s ��� driving cars from the 2000s, music from the 2000s, and of course, talking Top Gear from the 2000s. Travelling from where Ben lived in that decade, to where I lived, we'll stop off at relevant points along the way, as well as ending up at one of the most haunting locations in Top Gear history ��� RAF Elvington, the site of Richard Hammond's life-threatening 300mph crash.

programme.title: Richard Hammond FINALLY Drives the Ferrari Purosangue ��� And He Hates It
programme.desc: This test has been coming for a long time ��� Richard Hammond driving the 715bhp Ferrari Purosangue, their first ever go at an SUV. 6.5-litre V12, four seats, all-wheel drive, what's not to like? Quite a lot, apparently...

programme.title: We Found Richard Hammond's Perfect Project Car In This Scrapyard!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie discovers an absolute treasure trove of Volvos just outside London, and decides to search for anything badged with the coveted 'R' badge. Can he find a legendary turbo Volvo in this breakers yard?

programme.title: We Blew Up James May's Maserati

programme.title: The Abandoned Hammond Family Car That Nobody Knows About
programme.desc: Izzy gives us a tour of a legendary car from her childhood, a Land Rover Defender called the ���Wallycar���. Having sat in the courtyard for many years being neglected, she���s decided to accomplish one goal ��� get it started. Izzy invites a legend of Land Rover social media ��� Tati from Over In The Rover ��� to help diagnose any issues and get the car running once again.

programme.title: We���ve Bought A Cheap (And Incredibly Rare) Six-Cylinder BMW!
programme.desc: DriveTribe has set themselves a challenge ��� starting with a 100bhp car and a ��500 budget, can they trade their way up to the holy grail of 500hp? Through simple fixes, sponsor parts and ingenuity, can they go from a low-power shed to a supercar-rivalling beast? In this second episode, Mike uses the ��1900 from the selling of car number 1 to step up the ladder from a Ford KA to a BMW Z3. Using parts and some influencer help, the Z3 will be fixed and modified to then go up for sale and take things to the next level.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Phillip Culpepper and the Spring Thunder crew take Bryson Crawford on a mission to get his first Osceola of the year. A turkey surprises them while easing through a thick jungle of brush.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Witness a truly epic day on the water when Capt. Justin and Meredith find a secluded slice of beach teeming with redfish biting virtually everything. Topwater plugs, rusty flies and a live well full of bait make for an experience no redfish angler would forget

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc:
When your gut tells you to do something different than what’s in front of you, do you listen?
Capt. Justin and Meredith listen, and find that success comes in many forms. And it turns out that success can be really tasty, too!

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: It’s opening day of grouper season and, for Capt. Justin Leake and one of his longtime fishing buddies, that means a trip offshore is in order. And what better way to break in a new boat than heading to some reefs and filling the cooler with one of the Gulf of Mexico’s most popular fish?

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: There’s nothing like a change in weather conditions to wreck a perfectly good fishing plan, and that’s exactly what Capt. Justin Leake and his cousin encounter when December turns unseasonably warm. It’s a grey morning with thick fog so Justin and Capt. Brent Berry won’t be heading offshore right away as planned. Instead, Justin turns to his Humminbird CoastMaster charts to pinpoint a near shore artificial reef just five minutes from the St. Andrews Pass, where the anglers will do a little fishing until the fog burns off. Capt. Leake opts to send a jig to the bottom and he’s not very picky about the one that gets tied on. “When fishing reefs, the specific jig doesn’t matter because it’s all about the presentation,” he says. “When you’re sitting on top of a wreck, break out the ‘junk jigs’ – they get bit just fine.” And that proves to be the case as Justin and Brent enjoy non-stop battles against amberjack, red snapper and bonita. And with a bite this good, there’s no reason to go anywhere else! Also, we take a look at the United States Coast Guard Auxiliary’s new paddle craft safety initiative.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara dives into Chinese heritage at Chinatowns on either side of the continent. In Vancouver, recipes for appetizers cooked with Chinese tea and Dim Sum made by an opera singing Chinese local. Then – a lesson in making Chinese dumplings. Back at home, Wok Queen Grace Young describes her efforts to preserve New York's Chinatown as she and Sara make a BBQ Pork and Yangchow fried rice.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara follows a trail in the Mississippi Delta that leads straight to where blues is born. She keeps going to some of the richest farmland on earth where space age tractors bring in the harvest. Here they eat what they grow, and she joins the farmers to make an easy rice casserole and Blackened catfish. Later – the mother of all hometown cookbooks – Charleston Receipts

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Holidays are when Sara pulls out the stops when it comes to sweets and desserts. Try her Glazed Pears and shortbread pecan praline, or the surprising twist on potstickers filled with dried plum and apricots. On Ask Sara, tips on blind baking a pie crust. Then a favorite food gift in Sara's family - homemade Chocolate Peppermint Bark.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Chicken or eggs? Sara's got some amazing recipes to make them shine, starting with a chicken paillard, slathered in a compound date butter. Baked Chicken thighs are pointed up with the acid of homemade lemon pickles. Then a French chef shows Sara a simple galette of ham and eggs wrapped in pastry - perfect for breakfast, lunch or dinner.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's in Barcelona to sip gin and tonics in the shadow of the iconic Sagreda Familia, then joins a food writer to make classic Iberico Pork with Romanesco sauce and Gambas Ajillo. At home, Sara whips up Fideo - Barcelona's take on Paella made with noodles instead of rice.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's on the Spanish island of Mallorca, where an ancient olive grove tended by sheep is the magical setting for cooking a hunters stew over an open fire. Back home, Sara makes Seafood Gazpacho. On 'Ask Sara', she answers a viewer's questions about Lemons.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's wild food tour of Barcelona kicks off with fork breakfasts of snails and offal dishes and ends with wine literally poured into the mouth, plus vermouth bars and nut milk shakes. Then she joins a Catalon family to make a traditional fish stew Back at home, a quick and easy Spanish dish of Pork with Spanish Olives.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Fish is on the menu when Sara joins Greek Chef Maria Loi harborside near Athens to cook lemony, crispy skinned Branzino along with Beet, Beans and Feta Salad and Lemon Potatoes. Then it's off to Athen's Central Market to buy Retsina at a famous tavern for a rooftop mezze party in the shadow of the Acropolis. Back at home, Sara uses canned sardines for a quick and easy pantry taco.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara visits the romantic Greek island of Santorini to sip local wine on the edge of the Caldera. Then she joins a local chef to make Greek salad, Tzatziki and Shrimp Saganaki. In Vancouver, Sara learns their secrets of the coveted Spot Prawn from a Vancouver fisherman, then joins a friend to make Spot Prawn Risotto.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: A food tour of Tunisia's Sidi Bou Said with local chef Malek Labidi ends cooking Shakshuka in a beautiful garden overlooking the sea. Later we dive into the Medina in Tunis to watch women hand make couscous. In Istanbul, a shopping trip with local TV chef Refika Burgul, ends in the kitchen making Salt Cured Sea Bass plus the addictive Turkish beef and French fry favorite, Kochertme.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We've remodeled a lot of kitchens over the years, and often wondered how well the designs, ideas, and materials the homeowners chose worked out. To find out, we decided to revisit three kitchen remodels to see how well they worked out.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Today's Homeowner is on the road in New Hampshire to lend a helping hand to the winners of the “Win Danny and His Crew for a Day” sweepstakes, sponsored by John Deere, we're taking on the homeowners’ to-do list around their house and yard.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Owning a home represents the largest investment for most families, so it only makes sense help your investment grow.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Every member of your household should be safe and comfortable, and that includes your pets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We are at the home of the winner of the Today’s Dream Kitchen Contest, sponsored by Merillat cabinets. The winner received a complete kitchen makeover including new cabinets, countertops, flooring, lighting, and even a new kitchen door!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the first of our series on The Kuppersmith Project, we’ll tour the 1926, Tudor style home before our extensive renovation begins, and show you the plans we have in store to turn it into a house any family would love to call home.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re tackling the demolition work along with building a solid foundation in our extensive renovation of a 1926 home. After our remodeling is complete, the house will have been transformed into a beautiful and practical home.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: With the demolition and foundation work out of the way on the Kuppersmith Project, we’re finally ready to start building the addition and renovating the existing exterior to turn our 1926 house into a practical home any family would love to own.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: With the additions to our 1926 Kuppersmith Project house framed up and the roofing on, the next big step was roughing in all the plumbing, wiring, and ductwork so we can get started installing the insulation and drywall in the house.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Next up in our extensive renovation of the 1926 Kuppersmith Project house, we installed foam insulation in the walls and attic, hung drywall, painted the exterior, and began installing the kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The interior of the Kuppersmith Project house is taking shape as the cabinetry, moldings, and heart pine flooring are installed. Plus, we take sneak peak at the finished décor from designer Joe Boehm of Better Homes & Gardens magazine.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re grading the lot and preparing for the driveway on the outside of the Kuppersmith Project house renovation. Meanwhile on the inside, we’re focused on installing the granite and quartz countertops in the kitchen and master bath.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re tackling a number of projects outside on the Kuppersmith house, including installing motorized retractable screens and pouring the concrete driveway. Inside we’re putting in a shower surround and putting down a tile floor in the bathroom.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Work on the Kuppersmith Project – my extensive renovation of a 1926 Tudor style home – kicked into high gear with the sanding and finishing of the antique heart pine floors and installation of a beautiful paver patio.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: From lattice to lawn irrigation, there are a lot of details that have to be addressed when tackling a major renovation like the Kuppersmith Project house.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Known as Brazil's capital of happiness, Salvador da Bahia offers fruitful local markets, and rich Bahian cuisine. Here, Tony takes part in a traditional local ceremony, and experiences the culinary talents of the famous Bahian artist of the kitchen - Chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony travels to Tokyo, where he begins in the Tsujiki market and then is introduced to techniques in preparing edomae sushi. He also learns the diets of Sumo wrestlers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: London, England: In London, Tony attempts to dispel the myth that all English food is disgusting and over-boiled. Tony tries Nose to Tail Eating, explores traditional fare at Pie and Mash Shoppes, and then visits a predominantly Indian community.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Oaxaca, Mexico: Chef Tony Bourdain explores the exotic and colorful indigenous zone of Mexico's Oaxaca region where he tastes toasted grasshoppers and other delicacies. His adventure ends with mariachi music and, of course, lots of tequila.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Portugal: Portuguese cuisine holds a dear place in Tony's culinary heart. Tony travels to Porto, home of the famous Port wine, where he is immediately exposed to the codfish and the almost mythical place it holds in Portuguese cuisine and culture.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia and Japan: Taking his obsession with the film Apocalypse Now a little too seriously, Tony sets out for Pailin, reputed to be one of the most dangerous towns on earth. After his journey, Tony returns to Japan.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony catches a Bayou alligator, cools off with a world-famous snow cone, gets in trouble with the law, eats jambalaya with a dancing chef, and relaxes to some local jazz.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony sets out to find the real Singapore, with its multicultural restaurants and food markets. He samples prescription food dishes, explores the Geyland Serai Market, and rides the clean and efficient local subway.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Join Tony on his quest to characterize the perfect bar in New York City. Discover the importance of a maniacal bartender, the proper chemical makeup of drinks, the joys of seedy dive-bars, and the need for late-night snacks.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Jumping into a Thai tuk tuk taxi, Tony attempts to soak up Thai culture, and get lost in the cuisine of Chiang Mai, Thailand.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Known as Brazil's capital of happiness, Salvador da Bahia offers fruitful local markets, and rich Bahian cuisine. Here, Tony takes part in a traditional local ceremony, and experiences the culinary talents of the famous Bahian artist of the kitchen - Chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In the Caribbean paradise of St. Martin, Tony eats a healthy Rastafarian meal with a freedom fighter, helps prepare grub for a food caravan, discovers foodstuffs not available at American supermarkets, and finally relaxes at a beach bar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Scotland: Beginning in Glasgow, Tony experiences the heart-clogging glory of deep fried pizza, deep fried mars bars, and deep fried pickled eggs! Moving on to more traditional fare, Tony tastes haggis and learns to hunt and fish for his food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony travels to Tokyo, where he begins in the Tsujiki market and then is introduced to techniques in preparing edomae sushi. He also learns the diets of Sumo wrestlers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Morocco (Sahara): Tony traverses the Moroccan desert with one goal in mind, to eat a mud-oven-roasted sheep.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony returns to his beloved Hanoi, Vietnam to visit his friend, Linh, for the Vietnamese lunar New Year holiday of Tet. Together they enjoy the holiday and indulge in all the exotic delicacies Vietnamese culture offers.

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Counting and Numbers
programme.desc: The Super Simple show is a compilation of Super Simple’s most popular songs and series that our fans love! This compilation is all about Numbers and Counting! Includes children's song favorites "10 Little Buses", “10 In the Bed” & "10 Little Dinosaurs" and featuring Carl's Car Wash, The Bumble Nums, Sing Along With Tobee, and More!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Drew in Canada asks for ice skates so that he can play on an ice hockey team. When he gets to the rink he’s so nervous that he can’t play. Former Mountie Grand Albert gives Drew confidence-boosting tips so he can score the big goal.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yuri from Russia is part of a family circus. He needs a unicycle for his act on the high wire. The rest of the family is on their way when the circus train breaks down. Jerome performs an amazing act for the crowd while Jett goes to help them.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Karl from Norway asks for a Viking helmet. He goes to Viking Camp where Jett is mistaken for a dragon. The campers chase Jett onto a ship that heads for a waterfall. Mira comes and pushes them away from disaster.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Martine in Paris, France needs a cake-decorating machine. Her father the baker asks her to ice a giant cake for a party at the Eiffel Tower. When the cake is ready the traffic is terrible. Dizzy flies the cake through the sky over the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Vietnamese sisters Sen and Kim are fans of pop star Kellie. They ask for wigs like the one their idol wears. When Kellie’s van gets stuck in a rice paddy, Dizzy comes to lead the way to the concert and the sisters are Kellie’s special guests.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes brushes to Willem in The Netherlands who is going to paint a mural on a sea wall. When the mural is almost done, a storm approaches. Jett and Donnie borrow the propeller from a windmill to dry the painting before it is ruined.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jerome thinks Jett’s job is easy so he takes his place. He delivers a bathtub to Nayan in Thailand. Boonying the elephant takes a bath but is startled by a spray of water and runs off. Jett arrives to help bring Boonying back.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett carries tires to Alex and his sister Adriana in Monaco. They’ve built a hot dog car for Alex to ride in a soapbox derby. When ducks cause him to run off the course and into town, Paul comes and leads him back with a police escort.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a battery to Noah in Denmark, who’s built a dinosaur out of plastic blocks. When they power it up the dinosaur escapes and runs through the town. Donnie comes and builds another robot to confront the dinosaur and remove his battery.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a microphone to Ruby, a girl in Australia who hosts her own nature program. She interviews animals until a kangaroo snatches her microphone. Bello comes and plays leapfrog with the kangaroo and Ruby gets it all on tape.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a magician’s hat to Moritz in Austria, who is performing an act with his pet rabbit. As a finale, he will make a piano disappear. The naughty rabbit causes the piano to roll out of the theater. Dizzy comes and uses Rescue Ropes to keep the piano from falling into the Danube River and returns it to the theater for the final trick.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a fireman’s hat to Stefan in Germany. His dad is a fireman and is coming to school to tell everyone about his job. But a fire breaks out and the fire truck runs out of water. Donnie uses a fountain as a giant shower head, attaching it to a hose and tapping into underground springs to bring enough water to save the day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Meena is going to perform a Bollywood dance with her friends. Jett brings the costumes, but there is a mistake and they are all white instead of many colors. The kids dye the outfits but while they are drying the wind blows them away. Jerome arrives to help Jett gather up the costumes and get them back in time for the performance.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Peru and lands at a small airport where Pilar and her friends greet him. He gives them pins for their Fantastic Flyers Club. They want Jett to take them on an airplane ride but he is not a passenger plane. Jimbo sends Big Wing, who takes them on their very first trip into the sky!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Bolivia and brings a miner’s helmet to Angelo. His dog has run away. They go with his grandpa to the mine where they take a wild ride on a mining cart, which breaks while underground. Donnie arrives and drills his way through the stone surface to save them.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a bicycle to Nadia in Bangladesh, who lives on a houseboat with her Mom. Jett teaches her how to ride. When she wants to ride home they run into rain and the road is flooded. Donnie comes and adapts the bike to ride on water. When Nadia arrives home the houseboat is going down the river and the Super Wings must bring it back.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett arrives in rainy London and brings a teddy bear to Cecily. They give the bear an umbrella and take him out to play. The wind lifts the bear away and he flies over the city and falls into a crowd of people with umbrellas. Jerome comes to lead the crowd in a dance number that ends with the bear being revealed and reunited with Cecily.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language along with your favorite Baby Einstein Characters! Learn how to sign the names of common things from different objects found at home and outside, family, and even your very own neighborhood through repetition and narration. Real-life images of toys and objects along with gentle melodies engage viewers as they learn a variety of different signs.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Comedy Cartoon Shows for Children - Panda a Panda
programme.desc: What's your pandatude? Welcome to the world of two moody but hysterical pandas - On On & Guy Guy, who always seem to get into unfortunate mishaps as they navigate their relatable but surreal world. Their ordinary everyday situations often go awry in hilarious ways to become extraordinary. A short form silent slapstick comedy series, Panda a Panda will appeal to both kids as well as adults.

programme.title: Super Car Royce - Back To Back
programme.desc: Watch this compilation from Super Car Royce Back To School!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star & More Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers! Learn about animal sounds, shapes, and more!

programme.title: Kids TV Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Nursery rhymes, baby videos and kids songs that your kindergartener can sing and dance to all day long! Enjoy this first of many hour-long collections of Kids TV's most popular hit animations. Kids TV introduces your toddlers to a variety of classic nursery rhymes as well as original kids songs for a wholesome and fun way to learn the basics of life. See you inside!

programme.title: Car & Trucks Songs - Zeek And Friends
programme.desc: Join Zeek and friends in a musical adventure across the car cartoon city. Sing nursery rhymes, read wonderful stories and play cool games with your favorite cartoon heroes. Children learn valuable lessons while singing and dancing to the most popular rhymes like Old Mac Donald, Finger family, rig a jig jig, five little monkeys, Jingle bells and so many more!

programme.title: A Room Full Of Dreams Lofi Hip Hop And Chill Beats
programme.desc: A best place for Lofi hip hop music and chill beats providing fresh beats while you sip on coffee. Whether you are about to study or having a party or just relaxing we have you covered. Our positive mixes creates a perfect atmosphere for you to escape and unwind! We hope you find peace while listening to this music and have a wonderful, cheerful and fresh day.

programme.title: Wash Your Hands + More Kids Songs and Nursery Rhymes by Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Join your favorite nursery rhymes characters, Super Supremes on their fun adventures of learning. Learn to wash your hands and sing along with this healthy habits song and more popular baby songs like Soccer Song, Bath Time Song, Swimming Song, Yes Yes Song, Boo Boo Song, Please and Thank You, Zoo Song, Growing Up Song, Finger Family, Three Little Kittens and many more kids rhymes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Brandon Quark, an evil half-man, half-duck genius challenges, then teams up with Robotnik to capture Sonic. But Sonic knows their weakness, and pits the Badnik geniuses against one another, and sets himself free.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic plays Cyrano to bring Robotnik Jr. and Breezie together. The problem is, Breezie's crazy about Sonic. So Sonic gets out of the way, but when he does, Junior is captured by Robotnik, and Breezie comes to the rescue, finally falling for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails invents a Hover-Hanglider for Sonic's birthday, Sonic suggests he assist Prof. Von Schlemmer with his new Robotnik-Nabber machine. Robotnik hears about this, and poses as Von Schlemmer to trick Tails into inventing a Sonic-Nabber instead.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic loses his memory when Robotnik uses a hypnotic flower pollen on him, and tells him he's just an "ordinary" guy.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.desc: This is the story of "Rapunzel", but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland's one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. programme.desc: Sister adopts a chipmunk. Mama teaches Sister the 'Star light, star bright' principle.

programme.desc: Mama puts a ban on television for a week. Brother and Sister go trick or treating.
